comment: Ordered main-objective chain resolved against story flags. The first matching entry is the current next step.

objectives.text: Face the card clique on the road north of Bosch's block.
After the clique fight, head north to the relay gate and clear the Returnless King.
Follow the north road through the threshold and face Malady.
Meet Munch at the north threshold before you leave Morningside.
Keep heading north past the threshold to leave Morningside.
Reach Postwick down the southern route.
In Postwick, confront the registry boss at the town records.
Enter Postwick's arena and win the first venue fight.
Stay in the arena and win the second venue fight.
Finish the arena's third venue fight to become champion.
Leave Postwick through the northern road after the arena and registry are clear.
Explore. The record is still being written.
Attest the Spring source on the route beyond Postwick.
npcHints: The Spring source is beyond Postwick. Follow the open road and attest it.
The road out of Postwick leads to Spring. It needs a witness, not a brochure.

objectives.text: Continue to Dead Letter and enter the town of returned records.
npcHints: Dead Letter is ahead on the route. Keep going until the mail starts recognizing you.
Follow the road to Dead Letter. The town keeps what every other place returned.

objectives.text: Find and attest the Undelivered source in Dead Letter's return yard.
npcHints: The Undelivered source is in the return yard. Follow the dead mail deeper into town.
Dead Letter's return yard is holding a source nobody signed for.

objectives.text: Enter the Museum of Leaked Versions and clear its lobby guardian.
npcHints: The Museum of Leaked Versions is next. Its lobby guardian checks every original twice.
Head for Dead Letter's museum. Start with the thing guarding the lobby.

objectives.text: Push farther into the museum and defeat its second guardian.
npcHints: The lobby is clear. The museum's second guardian is deeper inside.
Keep moving through the exhibits. The next version is waiting past the lobby.

objectives.text: Reach the museum's deep vault and unmake Provenance 0.
npcHints: Provenance 0 is in the museum's deep vault. That is where the originals disappear.
Go below the exhibits. The coil that ate the originals is waiting in the vault.

objectives.text: Attest the Vault source on the Galleria service floor.
npcHints: The Vault source is on the Galleria service floor. Take the working escalators up.
Go to the Galleria and climb to the service floor. Vault is waiting there.

objectives.text: Travel to Solana Beach and attest the Pier source.
npcHints: The Pier source is at Solana Beach, out where the boardwalk meets the broadcast water.
Head to Solana Beach. The next source is waiting on the pier.

objectives.text: Find the Vacancy source in the Vacancy Flats motel strip.
npcHints: Vacancy is hiding in the motel strip at Vacancy Flats.
Follow the empty signs to Vacancy Flats. The source is inside the motel strip.

objectives.text: Attest the First Record source before returning to Morningside.
npcHints: One source remains: First Record. Find it before you go home.
First Record is the last unattested source. The route back waits after that.

objectives.text: Return to Morningside. Milady has occupied the town.
npcHints: Morningside is under Milady's read. Go home before the copy closes over it.
All eight sources point back to Morningside. Return there now.

objectives.text: Break Milady's first occupation cell in Morningside.
npcHints: The first occupation cell is holding Morningside's outer block. Break it.
Start at the edge of town. Milady's first cell is sealing the route inward.

objectives.text: Push inward and break Milady's second occupation cell.
npcHints: One cell is down. The second is farther inside Morningside.
Keep pushing toward the town center. The second occupation cell is active.

objectives.text: Destroy the final occupation cell and clear Morningside.
npcHints: The final cell is all that keeps Milady's occupation standing.
Two cells are gone. Finish the last one near the town core.

objectives.text: Approach Milady in the cleared plaza and end the read.
npcHints: Milady is exposed in the plaza. Approach her and finish this.
The occupation is gone. Milady herself is waiting in Morningside's plaza.

objectives.text: The record is open. Explore what survived.
npcHints: The read failed to close. What remains belongs to the people still here.
No next task. Just a town learning how to speak after the record stopped.
